analysis.grammar: ただ: adverb (ただ / just / merely); 素直に: adverb (素直に / straightforwardly / candidly). Phrase meaning 'just straightforwardly' or 'merely candidly'. No connectives.
椅子: noun (椅子 / chair); を: particle (object marker); 近付けて: verb in te-form (近付ける -> 近付けて / to bring near / approach). The structure is noun + object marker + verb in te-form.
